title: Multi-fixture prompt calibration for local live mini-run suite
problem: Ticket-066 suite exposed three failing fixtures: relationship drafting on GT02-style sources (wrong concept labels / claim id handoff) and claim extraction on the contradiction source (overlong scope). Operators need calibrated prompts and a controlled contradiction fixture so at least two suite fixtures pass report-only floors.
acceptance_criteria: Relationship prompt requires subject/object labels copied from allowed concept list only.
Mini-run relationship stage accepts all probe-local claim ids from stage 1 handoff.
Claim prompt adds concise-scope guidance and divergent-condition example.
Suite uses live_probe_contradiction_calibration_short.txt instead of long contradiction passage.
Live probe-mini-run-suite: at least two of four fixtures pass floors on qwen2.5:7b.
Mock pytest and verify remain green without Ollama.
No DB writes, export, cloud keys, or ticket authority for Qwen.
test_plan: Manual live: probe-mini-run-suite with ollama opt-in
non_goals: Do not weaken relationship or claim validators.
Do not add scratch DB persistence.
Do not let Qwen author tickets.
rollback_plan: Revert prompt, mini-run handoff, calibration fixture, and docs.
